properties.PMRecord:
{
  "type": "record",
  "name": "PMRecord",
  "fields": [
    { "name": "cell_id", "type": "string" },
    { "name": "collection_timestamp", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null },
    { "name": "dl_prb_utilization_pct", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null },
    { "name": "ul_prb_utilization_pct", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null },
    { "name": "throughput_mbps", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null },
    { "name": "active_ue_count", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null },
    { "name": "rrc_connected_avg", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null },
    { "name": "volte_sessions_active", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null },
    { "name": "handover_success_rate", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null },
    { "name": "cqi_mean", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null },
    { "name": "sinr_mean_db", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null },
    { "name": "availability_pct", "type": ["null", "double"], "default": null }
  ]
}
